rationale: The pair is topically central rather than incidental: the citing paper (“The Profitability of Purchase Limits During Shortages”) explicitly studies shortage-management policies, while the cited paper (“Stockouts in Online Retailing”) provides core stockout-effect and inventory-rationing evidence in the same domain. Given this strong construct overlap in the notes (shortages/stockouts, fulfillment/rationing, behavioral and profit implications), this citation could plausibly serve as foundational or comparison prior work and should receive full relation judgment.
